exercises.code:

exercises.code:

exercises.answer:
def present(nombre, titulo='Cliente'):
    return f'{titulo}: {nombre}'
print(present('Quispe'))
print(present('Quispe', titulo='VIP'))
exercises.justification_from_packet: [D2-Explorer second full walk from landing] Default titulo se usa si omites el arg; keyword titulo= lo sobreescribe. Dos llamadas: posicional y keyword del tema S05.

exercises.code:
def good_add(item, bucket=None):
    if bucket is None:
        bucket = []
    bucket.append(item)
    return bucket
print(good_add(1))
print(good_add(2))
# D2-Explorer: packet-only re-walk S05 S05-T1-B-E2
exercises.answer:
def good_add(item, bucket=None):
    if bucket is None:
        bucket = []
    bucket.append(item)
    return bucket
print(good_add(1))
print(good_add(2))
exercises.justification_from_packet: [D2-Explorer second full walk from landing] Default mutable se comparte entre llamadas; patrón seguro bucket=None + [] dentro. good_add(1) y good_add(2) independientes.
[D2-Explorer second full walk from landing] * fuerza keyword-only digits_only; True dígitos, False solo strip. Demuestro ambas firmas del contrato de teléfono.

def area(w, h):
    """Retorna el área de un rectángulo w×h."""
    return w * h
print(area.__doc__)
exercises.justification_from_packet: [D2-Explorer second full walk from landing] Docstring triple comillas bajo def; se lee en area.__doc__. No es comentario #; documenta el contrato del área.
[D2-Explorer second full walk from landing] Pre/post en docstring y ValueError accionable si falta @. Pruebo OK y error; strip+lower del email de intake.

exercises.code:
def normalize_nombre(raw: str) -> str:
    """Post: sin extremos ni dobles espacios."""
    return " ".join(raw.strip().split())
r = normalize_nombre('  Ana  María  ')
print(r)
assert r == r.strip() and '  ' not in r
print('post OK')
# D2-Explorer: packet-only re-walk S05 S05-T2-A-E3
exercises.answer:
def normalize_nombre(raw: str) -> str:
    """Post: sin extremos ni dobles espacios."""
    return " ".join(raw.strip().split())
r = normalize_nombre('  Ana  María  ')
print(r)
assert r == r.strip() and '  ' not in r
print('post OK')
exercises.justification_from_packet: [D2-Explorer second full walk from landing] Postcondición verificable con assert en el ejemplo de normalize_nombre. Sin extremos ni dobles espacios tras colapsar.
[D2-Explorer second full walk from landing] Hints graduales documentan str→int sin isinstance mágico en runtime. len_safe(123) fallaría igual en len().
[D2-Explorer second full walk from landing] Tupla (ok,value,err): 0 válido; negativo error de dominio. Hints Optional/Tuple del parser de monto.
[D2-Explorer second full walk from landing] Raise en dominio + try/except por fila evita tumbar el lote entero. Una fila mala no impide la buena.
[D2-Explorer second full walk from landing] Composición: strip_collapse + title en normalize_nombre. Funciones pequeñas una responsabilidad.
[D2-Explorer second full walk from landing] Orquestador devuelve dict con helpers de nombre y email. Sin I/O en el core de contacto.
[D2-Explorer second full walk from landing] Monstruo partido en 3 funciones + orquestador dict de 3 claves. Descomposición del nivel de abstracción por campo.
[D2-Explorer second full walk from landing] Pura e idempotente: f(f(x))==f(x) sin print interno. Solo dígitos del teléfono sintético.
[D2-Explorer second full walk from landing] Separo pureza de efectos: print solo en print_report. Core testeable sin capturar stdout.
[D2-Explorer second full walk from landing] Inyecto normalizador como parámetro default en process. Default digits y alternativo upper/strip.

f()

exercises.answer:
x = 1
def f():
    x = 2
    print('in', x)
f()
print('out', x)
exercises.justification_from_packet: [D2-Explorer second full walk from landing] LEGB: local dentro de f no pisa global sin keyword global; fuera sigue 1. Local, Enclosing, Global, Builtin.

exercises.code:
def make_multiplier(k):
    def inner(n):
        return n * k
    return inner
m3 = make_multiplier(3)
m10 = make_multiplier(10)
print(m3(4), m10(4))
# D2-Explorer: packet-only re-walk S05 S05-T4-A-E2
exercises.answer:
def make_multiplier(k):
    def inner(n):
        return n * k
    return inner
m3 = make_multiplier(3)
m10 = make_multiplier(10)
print(m3(4), m10(4))
exercises.justification_from_packet: [D2-Explorer second full walk from landing] Closure: inner captura k del enclosing make_multiplier. m3(4)=12 y m10(4)=40. Según el paquete activo de esta sección del walkthrough.
[D2-Explorer second full walk from landing] Factory mode digits|lower devuelve la fn sin global mode. Closures internos del patrón factory S05.
[D2-Explorer second full walk from landing] Asserts de valor e idempotencia antes de refactor. print OK cierra la suite mínima.

exercises.code:
def normalize_dir(raw):
    collapsed = ' '.join(raw.strip().split())
    return collapsed.upper()
assert normalize_dir('  av 1 ') == 'AV 1'
assert normalize_dir(normalize_dir('x')) == normalize_dir('x')
print(normalize_dir(' jr 2 '))
# D2-Explorer: packet-only re-walk S05 S05-T4-B-E2
exercises.justification_from_packet: [D2-Explorer second full walk from landing] Refactor a strip_collapse + upper sin romper asserts. Misma conducta AV 1 e idempotencia.
[D2-Explorer second full walk from landing] Suite (input,expected) con loop assert; mantengo colapsar sin title. No cambio política sin actualizar tests.
